product_priorities: Preserve calm, minimal, mobile-first PWA UX (<640px primary).
Protect S1→S2→S3 core loop quality before expanding secondary features.
Use documented UX contracts in docs/planning and specs/screens as source of truth.
execution_model: Operate orchestrator-first: decompose work, delegate implementation, keep central QA/integration gate.
Before execution, read docs/planning/06-tasks.md, docs/planning/06-screens.md, specs/domain/resources.yaml, then latest .claude/handoffs/handoff-*.json.
If tasks are coarse for multi-agent execution, split into smaller assignable units before dispatch.
Limit active coding peers to ~3-4 concurrent implementers on adjacent surfaces, then run integration checkpoints.

current_repo_state.working_tree: dirty with many uncommitted changes and new files
implementation_baseline: Next.js 16.2.4 + React 19 + TypeScript scaffold is present.
Supabase SSR helpers exist: lib/supabase/client.ts and lib/supabase/server.ts.
Route protection/session sync uses proxy.ts (not middleware.ts).
Migration scaffold exists but schema is not implemented yet (supabase/migrations/00000000000000_init.sql contains template comments only).
Main app screens are largely not implemented yet; app/page.tsx is a starter status page.

key_constraints: Follow TDD per task: RED → GREEN → REFACTOR → VERIFY.
Do not introduce out-of-scope features (guide audio/prompt/gamification out of MVP scope).
Do not create a separate idea resource; use rest_sessions.note only.
This project uses Supabase Cloud and proxy.ts instead of deprecated middleware.ts.
Given breaking changes in this Next.js version, read relevant guides under node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before implementation decisions.
quality_gates: Contract gate: implementation matches docs/planning + specs/domain/resources.yaml + specs/screens/*.yaml + specs/shared/*.yaml.
Flow gate: S1→S2→S3 golden path + edge cases validated (abort, skip, resume/recovery).
Frontend gate: browser QA with console error checks for every UI phase.
Review chain per phase: verification, evaluation, code review, security review (as needed), frontend/design review (as needed).
Complexity gate: reject unnecessary abstraction or inconsistent patterns.
sequencing_guidance: Phase order from 06-tasks: P0 setup → P1 common infra → P2 core loop → P3 onboarding/notifications → P4 archive/report → P5 paywall/settings/final states.
Near-term priority should focus on finishing P0 foundations and then P2 core loop quality once minimum infra is stable.
Keep one integration checkpoint after each parallel batch before opening next batch.
Do not treat placeholder UI as complete; require behavior and data contract validation.
known_gaps: No previous handoff JSON existed before this file.
Supabase SQL schema/RLS from resources contract is not yet implemented in migration.
README is still default create-next-app template and not aligned with product docs.
Current app route is a starter page, not spec-compliant S1 implementation.
No visible test harness/config for required TDD chain (unit/e2e) is confirmed from inspected files.

notes: Supabase Cloud is the backend target environment; keep env and integration assumptions cloud-first.
Use proxy.ts for request-time auth/session handling; middleware.ts is deprecated in this setup.
Start each fresh orchestration run by loading this handoff and revalidating repo diffs before assigning work.
